title: Upload Data
subtitle: Import tyre and fleet data from Excel or CSV files

banner.suffix: for validated, audited, multi-country imports with duplicate detection and rollback.

auto.label: Auto-detect
auto.desc: Figure it out from column names

fleetBanner.title: Fleet data has a dedicated upload
fleetBanner.desc: Use Fleet Master for vehicle imports - it has correct column mapping and validation.

columnsInfo.title: Your columns don't need to match exactly
columnsInfo.desc: The smart mapping engine recognises hundreds of column name variations, abbreviations, and Arabic headers. Use any naming convention - the engine will match automatically. You can adjust any mapping before uploading.

dropzone.prompt: Drop your Excel or CSV file here
dropzone.hint: or click to browse · Excel, OpenDocument, CSV/TSV supported

idle.fileTooLarge: File too large - maximum 50 MB. Split the file into smaller parts and upload separately.
idle.readError: Could not read "{fileName}". It may be open in another program, too large, or corrupted - close it elsewhere and try again.
idle.parseError: Could not read "{fileName}" as a spreadsheet or CSV. If it opens in Excel, re-save it as .xlsx or .csv and upload again. ({message})
idle.noCells: This file/sheet has no readable cells.

sheets.title: Select Sheets to Import
sheets.subtitle: This workbook has {count} sheets. Choose which to include - pivot and summary sheets are suggested to skip.

filePreview.title: File Preview
filePreview.hint: If the wrong row was detected as the header, pick the correct one - the table re-maps instantly.
filePreview.noDataRows: No data rows detected below the current header row - try selecting a different header row above.

completeness.allMapped: All {count} required fields are mapped. You can proceed to preview.
completeness.partial: {mapped}/{total} required fields mapped. Map the remaining fields before uploading.

unmappedWarning.prefix: {count} column(s) from your file are not mapped to any field - they will be saved in

columnMapping.title: Column Mapping
columnMapping.subtitle: Match your file's columns to the system fields. Confidence shown by colour.

dupCheck.title: Duplicate Check Results
dupCheck.reuploadWarning: This looks like data you have already uploaded - {count} matching records found.

preview.autoClassifyInfo: Records will be auto-classified on upload. High/Medium confidence results are marked cleaned instantly. Low confidence records are flagged for review in Data Cleaning.

quality.title: Data Quality
quality.lowFillWarning: ⚠ A required field is under 50% filled - check the column mapping or header row before uploading.

cleaning.title: Cleaning Preview
cleaning.aiCheckboxHint: Routes the {count} "need review" rows through the secure AI cleaning function for better category/risk. Uses AI tokens - off by default.

country.selectWarningDesc: Pick a specific country in the top bar (KSA / UAE / Egypt). Every row will be stamped with it so your data never mixes.
country.confirmed: Uploading to {country} - every row will be stamped with this country.

preview.countrySelectError: Select a specific country in the top bar before uploading. Every row will be stamped with that country so your data never mixes.
preview.buildError: Could not build the preview: {message}. Check the column mapping and try again.

uploading.title: Uploading & classifying
uploading.subtitle: Auto-classifying records with the Smart Engine

done.submittedDesc: {count} records sent to an administrator - they will appear once approved.

extraFields.title: {count} extra column(s) saved as custom data - nothing was lost
extraFields.desc: All columns that don't match a standard field are preserved in Custom Data. You can browse, search, export, or teach the system to recognise them permanently.

needsReview.title: {count} records need manual classification
needsReview.desc: Open Data Cleaning to approve or adjust them.

done.errorLog: View error log ({count} row(s) skipped - see reason per row)
